ghost_zones_summary.methodology_note: PRD-3: Ghost flags require prior_avg >= 1.0 viol/day AND >= 5 active days in prior window. Zones with recent_active_days >= 1 are classed INTERMITTENT (not true enforcement blind spots). Only TRUE_GHOST zones (zero recent activity + strong prior signal) warrant immediate investigation.
